    Method
    Description
    void
    YearEndReportViewModel.loadWrappedData(int year, Consumer<YearEndReportViewModel.WrappedData> onSuccess)
    Loads all wrapped data for year on a background thread, then calls onSuccess on the JavaFX thread.
